ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Banswara Syntex Limited has issued an intimation regarding its 50th Annual General Meeting scheduled for July 30, 2026, and the availability of its FY 2025-26 Annual Report, which also outlines the final dividend record and payment dates. A significant point of compliance is the reminder for shareholders holding physical securities to update mandatory KYC details (PAN, bank accounts, etc.) as per SEBI regulations. Failure to comply will restrict all future payments, including dividends, to electronic mode only, potentially impacting shareholders who have not updated their information.
